categories.name: Risk Management
categories.description: Full lifecycle risk assessment capabilities including TARA automation, threat-to-asset mapping, and residual risk tracking per ISO/SAE 21434.

subFeatures.name: Automated TARA Generation
subFeatures.description: Ability to automatically generate Threat Analysis and Risk Assessment based on system architecture inputs.

subFeatures.name: Threat-to-Asset Mapping
subFeatures.description: Bi-directional traceability between identified threats and system assets/components.

subFeatures.name: Residual Risk Tracking
subFeatures.description: Tracking of residual risk after mitigation measures are applied, with risk acceptance workflows.

subFeatures.name: Risk Lifecycle Management
subFeatures.description: End-to-end risk management from identification through monitoring, including periodic reassessment triggers.

subFeatures.name: Attack Path Analysis
subFeatures.description: Automated or guided analysis of potential attack paths through system architecture.

subFeatures.name: Risk Reporting & Dashboards
subFeatures.description: Visual dashboards and exportable reports for risk posture communication to stakeholders.

categories.name: Vulnerability Management
categories.description: Discovery, prioritization, remediation tracking, and feed integration for vulnerability management.

subFeatures.name: CVE/NVD Feed Integration
subFeatures.description: Automated ingestion of CVE data from NVD, vendor advisories, and other vulnerability databases.

subFeatures.name: Vulnerability Prioritization
subFeatures.description: Risk-based prioritization considering CVSS, asset criticality, exploitability, and automotive context.

subFeatures.name: Remediation Tracking
subFeatures.description: Workflow for tracking vulnerability remediation from discovery through verification.

subFeatures.name: SBOM-Based Vulnerability Matching
subFeatures.description: Automatic matching of known vulnerabilities against components listed in SBOM/HBOM.

subFeatures.name: Vulnerability-to-Risk Linkage
subFeatures.description: Linkage of individual vulnerabilities to broader risk assessments and treatment plans.

categories.name: Asset Management
categories.description: Data import, hierarchical structuring, relationship mapping, BOM management, and lifecycle tracking for assets.

subFeatures.name: Data Import Capabilities
subFeatures.description: Ability to import asset data via bulk upload, API, or manual entry from various formats.

subFeatures.name: Hierarchical Asset Structuring
subFeatures.description: Support for nested, hierarchical organization of assets reflecting system architecture.

subFeatures.name: Asset Relationship Mapping
subFeatures.description: Ability to define and visualize relationships and dependencies between assets.

subFeatures.name: SBOM Management
subFeatures.description: Import, storage, and management of Software Bill of Materials in standard formats (SPDX, CycloneDX).

subFeatures.name: HBOM Management
subFeatures.description: Import, storage, and management of Hardware Bill of Materials.

subFeatures.name: CBOM Management
subFeatures.description: Import, storage, and management of Cryptographic Bill of Materials.

subFeatures.name: Asset Lifecycle Tracking
subFeatures.description: Tracking assets through their lifecycle: creation, deployment, maintenance, and decommissioning.

subFeatures.name: Version Management
subFeatures.description: Tracking of asset versions, firmware revisions, and software updates across the fleet.

categories.name: Incident Management
categories.description: Incident detection, alerting, logging, playbook management, escalation, KPI tracking, forensics, and external integration.

subFeatures.name: Incident Detection & Alerting
subFeatures.description: Automated detection of security incidents with configurable alerting and notification mechanisms.

subFeatures.name: Logging & Reporting
subFeatures.description: Comprehensive incident logging with structured data capture and regulatory-compliant reporting.

subFeatures.name: Playbook Management
subFeatures.description: Predefined and customizable incident response playbooks with step-by-step guided workflows.

subFeatures.name: Escalation Workflows
subFeatures.description: Configurable escalation paths based on severity, impact, and response SLAs.

subFeatures.name: KPI Tracking (MTTD, MTTR)
subFeatures.description: Measurement and dashboarding of key performance indicators: Mean Time to Detect, Mean Time to Respond.

subFeatures.name: Forensics & Root Cause Analysis
subFeatures.description: Tools for post-incident forensic analysis, evidence preservation, and root cause investigation.

subFeatures.name: External IR Platform Integration
subFeatures.description: Integration with external incident response platforms, CSIRT tools, and auto-ISAC feeds.

categories.name: Technology Stack
categories.description: Underlying architecture, cloud infrastructure, APIs, database technology, and integration capabilities.

subFeatures.name: Architecture
subFeatures.description: Underlying software architecture: monolith, microservices, serverless, or hybrid approach.

subFeatures.name: Cloud Infrastructure & Deployment
subFeatures.description: Deployment model: SaaS, on-premise, hybrid. Cloud providers supported. Multi-tenancy approach.

subFeatures.name: Database Technology
subFeatures.description: Database technology used for data storage, including scalability and backup capabilities.

subFeatures.name: Security Architecture
subFeatures.description: Encryption at rest and in transit, access control model, audit logging, and data isolation.

subFeatures.name: Scalability & Performance
subFeatures.description: Ability to scale with growing data volumes, users, and asset counts typical of automotive OEMs.

categories.name: API Capabilities
categories.description: Availability, comprehensiveness, documentation, and authentication mechanisms of the tool's API.

subFeatures.name: API Availability
subFeatures.description: Whether the tool provides a public API (REST, GraphQL, gRPC, etc.) for programmatic access.

subFeatures.name: Data Access Comprehensiveness
subFeatures.description: Percentage of tool functionality accessible via API. Can all data be read and written programmatically?

subFeatures.name: API Documentation Quality
subFeatures.description: Quality and completeness of API documentation: OpenAPI specs, code examples, interactive docs.

subFeatures.name: API Authentication & Security
subFeatures.description: Authentication mechanisms: OAuth 2.0, API keys, JWT. Rate limiting and versioning support.

categories.name: Integrations
categories.description: Checklist of common tool integrations: project management, CI/CD, threat intel, SOC tools, and more.

subFeatures.name: Jira Integration
subFeatures.description: Native or plugin-based integration with Atlassian Jira for issue tracking and project management.

subFeatures.name: ServiceNow Integration
subFeatures.description: Integration with ServiceNow for IT service management and incident workflows.

subFeatures.name: CI/CD Pipeline Integration
subFeatures.description: Integration with CI/CD tools: Jenkins, GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps.

subFeatures.name: Threat Intelligence Platforms
subFeatures.description: Integration with threat intelligence feeds and platforms (MISP, STIX/TAXII, etc.).

subFeatures.name: SOC/SIEM Tools
subFeatures.description: Integration with Security Operations Center and SIEM platforms (Splunk, Sentinel, etc.).

subFeatures.name: SBOM Tools
subFeatures.description: Integration with SBOM generation and analysis tools (Syft, Grype, Snyk, etc.).

subFeatures.name: Version Control Systems
subFeatures.description: Integration with Git repositories, GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket for code-level traceability.

subFeatures.name: Communication Tools
subFeatures.description: Integration with Slack, Microsoft Teams, or other communication platforms for notifications.

subFeatures.name: Other Integrations
subFeatures.description: Additional vendor-specified integrations not covered by the standard checklist.

categories.name: Certifications
categories.description: Security and compliance certifications held by the tool vendor.

subFeatures.name: ISO 27001
subFeatures.description: Whether the vendor holds ISO/IEC 27001 information security management certification.

subFeatures.name: SOC 2
subFeatures.description: Whether the vendor holds SOC 2 Type I or Type II certification for security, availability, and confidentiality.

subFeatures.name: ISO/SAE 21434 Compliance
subFeatures.description: Whether the tool or vendor has been certified or assessed for ISO/SAE 21434 compliance.

subFeatures.name: Other Certifications
subFeatures.description: Additional relevant certifications: TISAX, ISO 9001, CSA STAR, FedRAMP, etc.

categories.name: Sponsor Disclosure
categories.description: Transparency about which evaluated tool vendors are ASRG sponsors. This category does not affect the overall score.

subFeatures.name: ASRG Sponsor Status
subFeatures.description: Whether this vendor is a current ASRG sponsor and at what tier.
